title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 7 - Deploying Databases
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 7 covers deploying and managing databases at scale using SQL and NoSQL systems. The lecture includes best practices for efficient data storage and querying, taught by Harvard's David J. Malan through edX and Harvard Extension School.
